Entries.{{ModID}}_WizardMail: Enlightened @^, you have learned how to craft a potion machine and have made good use of your mushroom essence extractor. Come to my house and bring the following: ^ 1 Essence of the Great Wood Mushroom, 1 Morel and 1 red mushroom. ^ I will teach you the secrets of potion brewing. %item specialOrder {{ModID}}_WizardPotionQuest%%[#]Potion Brewing Course
Entries.{{ModID}}_WizardPotionQuest1_complete: Congratulations on completing my trial. With the book that have sent you you will be able to brew more potions from now on.^ Magnus R.[#]Potion Knowledge

Entries.{{ModID}}_ItemDeliveryWizard: ItemDelivery/Potion Studies/Seems like the Wizard wants to teach you something about potions!/Bring him 1 Essence of the Great Wood Mushroom, 1 Morel and 1 poisonous mushroom/Wizard <Item Id> 1 Wizard (O)257 1 Wizard (O)420 1/-1/0/5000/-1/false/Ah, you have brought the required ingredients.
